title: Sleep winddown card
sentence: Show a short evening card that helps plan bedtime based on the last few nights.

title: Nutrition pattern note
sentence: Add a plain note when food logging shows the same missed pattern several days in a row.

title: Recovery check before activity
sentence: Before suggesting hard activity, show whether sleep and recent load make that a good idea.

title: Home source clarity
sentence: Make each Home insight say whether it comes from device data, manual input, or demo data.

title: Weekly retro in statistics
sentence: Group the week into Home, Sleep, Nutrition, Activity, and General so progress is easier to scan.
